chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 8239 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 17.02.2025 Mr. Hanif Faisal Alam, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Waseem Iqbal, advocate for respondent Mr. Imran Ahmed Abro, Assistant Advocate General Per learned counsel, notice has been impugned herein, which shall be responded to by the petitioner before the issuing authority. It is articulated that it may be just and proper for the said notice to be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, and pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
